about.title: About Olive Oil
about.text: With a history spanning thousands of years, olive oil is one of the most treasured legacies of Mediterranean culture. Its natural production process, nutritious content and unique aroma make it indispensable at our tables.
about.f1Text: Made from 100% natural olives with no additives.
about.f2Text: Rich in vitamin E and antioxidants.
about.f3Text: A natural part of a balanced diet.

varieties.title: Olive Oil Varieties
varieties.text: Choose the olive oil that best suits your needs and your palate.
varieties.v1Text: Produced early in the season from green olives. Intense aroma, high in polyphenols.
varieties.v2Text: Obtained from ripe olives. Balanced aroma with a smooth finish.
varieties.v3Text: First cold press, in its purest form. The highest quality olive oil.

tips.title: Olive Oil Usage Tips
tips.text: Use olive oil the right way to enhance its flavor and benefits.
tips.t1Text: Adds flavor and health to your fresh salads.
tips.t2Text: Ideal for medium-heat cooking and sautéing.
tips.t3Text: Pairs perfectly with bread, cheese and olives.
tips.t4Text: Adds a distinctive touch to desserts with the right recipes.

aboutPage.metaTitle: About Us — Turkish Olive Oil Producer Since 1985 | Veroliva
aboutPage.metaDescription: Veroliva is a family-run Turkish olive oil producer and manufacturer in Pelitköy, Burhaniye. Three generations of cold pressed extra virgin olive oil craftsmanship since 1985.

hero.title: Our Family's Legacy, Our Land's Bounty
hero.p1: Veroliva began in 1985 with our love for the olive in the fertile lands of the Aegean. As a family-run Turkish olive oil producer, with knowledge, labor and passion passed down through generations, today we bring naturalness and quality to your table.
hero.p2: Our purpose is to bring you olive oil in its purest, additive-free and natural form, and to carry this unique flavor to future generations.

features.f1Text: No additives — natural in its purest form.
features.f2Text: Our cold-press method preserves nutritional value.
features.f3Text: Supports a healthy life with natural ingredients.
features.f4Text: We work with a nature-conscious production approach.
features.f5Text: From local Aegean growers, supporting local development.

story.title: Traditional Craftsmanship Since 1985
story.text: A story of three generations of patience and love: for us, every tree is a legacy and every harvest a celebration. We blend traditional craftsmanship with nature's patience.
story.t1Text: We planted our first olive trees.
story.t2Text: We adopted cold pressing and focused on quality.
story.t3Text: We began bringing our naturalness to more tables.
story.t4Text: With strength drawn from tradition, we leave a legacy of quality for the future.

process.title: Crafted with Nature
process.p1Text: Our olives are picked with care, right on time.
process.p2Text: Only the finest olives are selected and sorted.
process.p3Text: Pressed at low temperature to preserve nutrients.
process.p4Text: Our oil rests naturally and is never refined.
process.p5Text: Bottled in its purest form and brought to your table.

faqPage.metaTitle: Frequently Asked Questions | Veroliva Olive Oil
faqPage.metaDescription: FAQ about extra virgin olive oil, cold pressing, early harvest, storage, international shipping, bulk olive oil supply and private label production.
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.intro: Everything you may wonder about our olive oils, our production process and orders. Can't find your answer? Write to us.

items.q1: What is extra virgin olive oil?
items.a1: Extra virgin olive oil is the highest quality grade: obtained from olives purely by mechanical means, without any chemical treatment, with free acidity below 0.8%. All Veroliva oils are extra virgin grade.
items.a2: Cold pressed means the olives are pressed at temperatures below 27°C (80°F). Low temperature preserves the aroma, vitamins and antioxidants. At Veroliva, the entire harvest is processed by cold pressing.
items.q3: What makes early harvest olive oil special?
items.a3: Early harvest olives are picked while still green. The yield is lower, but the polyphenol (antioxidant) content is much higher and the aroma is more intense, with grassy notes. That is why early harvest oils are more prized.
items.q4: How should olive oil be stored?
items.a4: Keep it sealed, away from light and heat, in a cool (14-18°C) dark place. Dark glass bottles or tins protect the oil from light. Properly stored olive oil stays fresh for 18-24 months.
items.q5: Is your olive oil natural and additive-free?
items.a5: Yes. Our oils are made from 100% olives, with no additives, preservatives or refining. Olives picked from our own family groves are pressed on the same day.
items.a6: Yes, we ship worldwide. For international orders, reach us via the contact page; shipping time and cost vary by country.
items.q7: Do you supply bulk olive oil?
items.a7: Yes. As a Turkish olive oil manufacturer, we are a bulk olive oil supplier for restaurants, retailers and export partners. Send us your requirements via the contact page.
items.q8: Do you offer private label olive oil?
items.a8: Yes, we produce private label olive oil for your own brand. Contact us for bottle sizes, labelling and packaging options.
items.a9: Orders are dispatched within 1-2 business days. Shipping within Türkiye is free for orders over 1500 TL.
